nasb.text: On that day the prince shall provide for himself and all the people of the land a bull for a sin offering.

esv.text: On that day the prince shall provide for himself and all the people of the land a young bull for a sin offering.

cnv.text: 在那一天，君王要為自己和國中所有的人民預備一頭公牛作贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 在逾越节当天，君王要预备一头公牛为自己和百姓作赎罪祭。
